_note: Hand-written English lines for support-card compound/conditional unique effects (master.mdb support_card_unique_effect type >= 101), which have no text_data string. cardId -> array of display lines (values baked into the text). Applied by scripts/build-card-unique-effects.ts. Effects/values verified vs GameTora + Game8 (2026-07-01); wording is our own, not copied. See docs/provenance.md §6b. Keys starting with _ are ignored.
